title: <div>This application, &quotInfinite Wiki,&quot is a dynamic, AI-powered hyperte
content:
This application, "Infinite Wiki," is a dynamic, AI-powered hypertext encyclopedia. Its core functionality allows users to explore a web of interconnected knowledge where every word in a definition becomes a hyperlink to a new, dynamically generated entry.

Here is a breakdown of its functionality:

Core Concept
The application is built on the idea of a self-generating wiki. When a user looks up a topic, the app doesn't pull from a database. Instead, it uses the Google Gemini API to generate a concise, encyclopedia-style definition in real-time. The key feature is that once the definition is displayed, every single word within it becomes a clickable link, allowing the user to instantly navigate to a new definition for that word, creating an endless "rabbit hole" of exploration.

Key Features & User Flow
Topic Exploration:
Search: Users can enter any word or concept into a search bar to get its definition.
Random Discovery: A "Random" button provides a curated, interesting topic, encouraging serendipitous learning.
Hypertext Navigation: This is the central mechanic. Clicking any word in a generated article makes that word the new topic, seamlessly chaining from one concept to the next.
